capabilities: Establish a robust data governance framework within catalog systems to ensure compliance with organizational policies and regulatory requirements.

procedure.action: Assert governance policies by running automated checks against a predefined policy schema using JSON Schema draft-07; log any validation errors to governance_log.

Initialize governance workflows by deploying YAML-based workflow definitions to the catalog system using the 'kubectl apply' command; ensure all workflows are active and error-free by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.

Enforce policies by setting up automated triggers in the catalog system that execute compliance checks on data access events; log violations to policy_violation_log using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Render compliance reports by querying the catalog system's audit logs using SQL to extract policy adherence metrics; export results to CSV for review by compliance officers.

Conduct periodic audits by scheduling cron jobs to run compliance checks every 24 hours; alert the governance team if any discrepancies are found using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Procedure to implement data governance workflows in catalog systems, ensuring compliance and policy enforcement through structured validation and reporting.
title: Data Governance Workflow Implementation in Catalog Systems

failureConditions: Non-compliance when workflows are misconfigured, causing policy checks to be bypassed and leading to unauthorized data access.
Data integrity issues when policy enforcement is inconsistent, causing conflicting data states across catalog entries.
Audit failures when compliance reports are incomplete due to missing or incorrect log entries, leading to regulatory penalties.
metrics: governance policies by running automated checks against a predefined policy schema using JSON Schema draft-07
all required keys are present via config_validate()
